coverage_notes.main_math_added_or_confirmed_in_this_reg: PCA/QPCA, principal subspace, spectral truncation, Schmidt-mode truncation
low-rank PSD approximation, operator low-rank factorization, coarse-grained operator algebra
covariance spectral compression, correlation-tensor compression, operator compression
entropy family sweep, log-negativity, weighted/history/transport entropy candidates
carrier, geometry, operator, bipartite, entropy baseline legos
representation, geometry, metric, entropy, channel candidates
characteristic/eigenvalue/Husimi/Wigner views, geometry killers, equivalence classes
POVMs, Blackwell-style comparison, channel-space geometry, non-metric boundaries
pure-state rays, Kraus/Lindblad/instrument rows, Berry curvature, spectral decomposition
Axis-0 field candidates, torus-seat/path/shell-weighted entropy, tensor-network and ring support
F01/N01, `M(C)`, `D(C²)`, Hopf map, loop laws, Weyl pair, engine family split
Ti/Te/Fi/Fe, loop vector fields, placement tuples, operator parameters
pre-entropy ladder, admissibility/embargo/fence objects, bridge/shell/history support
